content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"
    app:startDestination="@+id/Notes">

    <fragment
        android:id="@+id/Notes"
        android:name="com.omgodse.notally.fragments.Notes"
        android:label="@string/app_name">

        <action
            android:id="@+id/NotesToSearch"
            app:destination="@id/Search"
            app:enterAnim="@anim/nav_default_enter_anim"
            app:exitAnim="@anim/nav_default_exit_anim"
            app:popEnterAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_enter_anim"
            app:popExitAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_exit_anim" />
    </fragment>

    <fragment
        android:id="@+id/Labels"
        android:name="com.omgodse.notally.fragments.Labels"
        android:label="@string/labels">

        <action
            android:id="@+id/LabelsToDisplayLabel"
            app:destination="@id/DisplayLabel"
            app:enterAnim="@anim/nav_default_enter_anim"
            app:exitAnim="@anim/nav_default_exit_anim"
            app:popEnterAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_enter_anim"
            app:popExitAnim="@anim/nav_default_pop_exit_anim" />

    </fragment>

    <fragment
        android:id="@+id/Deleted"
        android:name="com.omgodse.notally.fragments.Deleted"
        android:label="@string/deleted" />

    <fragment
        android:id="@+id/Archived"
        android:name="com.omgodse.notally.fragments.Archived"
        android:label="@string/archived" />

    <fragment
        android:id="@+id/Settings"
        android:name="com.omgodse.notally.fragments.Settings"
        android:label="@string/settings" />

    <fragment
        android:id="@+id/Search"
        android:name="com.omgodse.notally.fragments.Search" />

    <fragment
        android:id="@+id/DisplayLabel"
        android:name="com.omgodse.notally.fragments.DisplayLabel"
        android:label="{SelectedLabel}" />

</navigation>
